## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `dotnet build src/Clipora` succeeds
- [ ] Relevant behavior was tested on Windows
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No clipboard data, databases, personal files, local paths, credentials, certificates, logs, or build outputs are included
- [ ] Development runs used `scripts/start-dev.ps1` and isolated data
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed
